Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And For Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And For Document Production
Off Calendar Feb-19-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO and SGT. ROBERT TOTAH'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And For Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And For Document Production will be heard at 9 am on the Discovery calendar. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Defendants City And County Of San Francisco And Sgt. Robert Totah'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And For Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And For Document Production
Off Calendar Feb-19-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO and SGT. ROBERT TOTAH'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And For Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And For Document Production - The Court adopts its tentative ruling, which was not contested, as follows: This motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories, responses to request for production of documents, and production of said documents is granted, without opposition. All responsive discovery shall be served on or before March 17, 2014. Sanctions in the sum of $500.00 as against Plaintiff are awarded and shall be paid on or before March 17, 2014. The court signed the proposed order submitted with the moving papers. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2014 Assigned To Arbitration On Apr-21-14
